title: Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026 OUT

detail.title: Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026 released for MBBS and PG Medical exams. Check theory, practical and supplementary exam schedules for 2026-27 and download PDF at saurashtrauniversity.ac.in.

content.text: Saurashtra University has officially released the Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026 for Medical Faculty. The circular contains the complete schedule for Theory and Practical examinations of MBBS and PG courses for the academic year 2026-27. The notification was issued on 07 May 2026.

Students can check the detailed exam dates for Regular and Supplementary examinations on the official university website. The schedule covers First Year MBBS, Second Year MBBS, Third MBBS Part-1, PG Exams and PG Diploma examinations.

To download the official notification, visit the university portal and check the latest circulars section. Students are advised to verify all dates carefully and contact the Examination Department in case of any discrepancy.
Direct Link to Download Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026 PDF Here

content.text: Saurashtra University has announced the complete exam schedule for medical courses for the session 2026-27. This includes theory, practical and result dates for Regular and Supplementary exams of MBBS and PG programmes.

rows: First Year MBBS, Second Year MBBS, Third MBBS Part-1, PG Exams, PG Diploma

sections.heading: Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026 notification provides a clear schedule for theory and practical examinations. All exams are planned between July 2026 and February 2027. Students can refer to the official PDF for detailed subject-wise dates.
Below is the summary of important examination periods:

rows: P.G. Diploma Exam with Supplementary Exam of P.G.

sections.heading: How to Download Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026 notification from the official university website. Follow the simple steps given below.

items: Visit the official Saurashtra University website.
Navigate to the Examination or Circulars section.
Look for the latest notification dated 07 May 2026 regarding Medical Faculty Exam Dates.
The file will open in your browser. Review the complete schedule carefully.
Download and save the PDF. Take a printout for future reference and exam preparation.

content.text: Students should check the official timetable carefully and keep a copy handy for effective exam preparation. Regularly visit the university website for any updates or changes.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Saurashtra University Exam Date 2026

content.text: The official notification contains all essential information regarding the upcoming medical examinations. Students must go through every detail mentioned in the circular.

items: Exam name and year (First, Second, Third MBBS Part-1, PG & PG Diploma)
Theory examination dates
Practical / Clinical examination period
Result declaration dates
Regular and Supplementary exam schedules
Thesis submission last date (15 July 2026)
Important instructions for colleges and students.
